channel.title: Blog on LeMaterial
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on LeMaterial

item.title: Celebrating one year of LeMaterial
item.description: One-year anniversary retrospective published on December 2, 2025, covering project growth and upcoming priorities.

item.title: LeMaterial launch blogpost
item.description: Launch post published on December 10, 2024, presenting LeMaterial’s scope, collaborators, and first public resources.
